name: Sword Swing
description: a quick whoosh of a sword swung through the air

ai.prompt: A steel sword swung fast through the air: a sharp, weighty whoosh with an airy metallic edge, no impact. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
